parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-864 (RP28 Marketplace failure-recovery permission/audit binding bridge, Risk A, 10 units, RP28.P07.M05.S05-RP28.P07.M05.S14). The descriptor-only implementation is sound and internally consistent. MARKETPLACE_CP864_PACK_BINDING and MARKETPLACE_CP864_REQUIREMENTS match the baseline exactly: pack_id CP00-864, risk_class A, unit_count 10, first RP28.P07.M05.S05 / last RP28.P07.M05.S14, upstream CP00-863, next CP00-865/RP28.P07.M05.S15, source_descriptor MarketplaceCp863FailureRecoveryFoundationBridgeDescriptor; deliverable_distribution (failure_recovery 8, security_audit 1, implementation 1) and micro_title_distribution (Permission And Audit Binding 10) match the live plan (docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json) and manifest. required_section_rows = FAILURE_RECOVERY_ROWS.slice(4,14) correctly yields the 10 rows Missing-resource through Compensation-expectation; descriptor case-set row_count is 10. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are thoroughly enforced via createRow/ROW_EXTRAS defaults, MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION, and the CP864 descriptor/coverage/contract validators (descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, writes_product_state=false; no permission_decision_written/audit_event_written; no real client data, secrets, OAuth tokens, prompt/completion, permission-decision detail, or audit-event body; no runtime-open flags). The authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false; Claude packet is read_only with promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; Hermes packet is control-plane only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, writes_product_state=false, no_real_data=true) used solely for deterministic evidence, not product runtime. model.test.js carries meaningful CP864 assertions (coverage.errors==[], by_deliverable==requirements, descriptor errors==[], runtime-closed flags, row_count==10, contract projection current). The contract JSON shows CP00-864 current/latest with validation.valid=true, latest_pack_id/plan_pack_id CP00-864, and full no_write_attestation; the validate script checks the full CP845->CP864 upstream chain plus CP864 coverage/descriptor/contract. All pack state files honestly report production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / pending_review / in_progress with no premature production_ready=true or enterprise-trust claim. Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1434-byte valid JSON result), the 0-byte placeholder review result is correctly classified as pending (no valid receipt claimed), no malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped evidence is asserted, and unrelated dirty files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html, LDIP invalid-attempt JSON, workbook/docx artifacts) are correctly segregated as not part of this pack. One non-blocking P3: the full 10-command closeout validation suite is sequenced post-review and only the two marketplace commands are evidenced as passing, so suite pass/fail is not directly attestable from this receipt (already gated by the pack). No P0/P1/P2 issues. This review is an independent read-only check and does not constitute final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains outside this receipt.

findings.title: Full validation suite execution is sequenced post-review and not directly observable in this receipt
findings.details: command-evidence.json records only two passing commands prior to review (npm run rp28:marketplace:validate exit 0; node --test packages/marketplace/test/*.test.js exit 0) and sets gate_outcome="pending_valid_pack_review_and_full_validation" with status "pending_full_validation". The full closeout suite required before promotion (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) has not been executed/recorded yet. As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash) I cannot run these, so their pass/fail is not directly attestable from this receipt. The pack correctly does not assert production_ready=true and gates promotion on these steps (manifest production_ready=false, construction-inspection verdict PENDING, adjudication PENDING).
findings.recommendation: Before flipping production_ready / marketplace_failure_recovery_permission_audit_bridge_descriptor_verified, run and record the full validation suite as passing, normalize exactly one valid hardened read-only review receipt, complete adjudication/inspection, and regenerate the next-pack queue.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking. Already enforced by the pack's gate_outcome=pending_valid_pack_review_and_full_validation and pack_level_claude_review.status=pending_valid_review; no code change required. Reviewer confirms no premature production_ready=true or enterprise-trust claim exists.
